name: corp-local-dev
description: This is a template project with Vite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-og-images.mjs && vite build && node scripts/prerender-knowledge-base.mjs && node scripts/prerender-excel-to-app.mjs && node scripts/prerender-agent-platforms.mjs && node scripts/prerender-catalog-matching.mjs && node scripts/prerender-information-system.mjs && node scripts/prerender-tokens.mjs && node scripts/prerender-landing.mjs && node scripts/verify-htaccess.mjs
